Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. More precise elevation data for GraphHopper routing engine 62 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. European Parliament decided that Chat Control 1.0 must stop 37 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. The Last Contract: William T. Vollmann's Battle to Publish an Epic (2025) 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Quantization from the Ground Up 282 upvotes, 50 comments
  5. Obsolete Sounds 84 upvotes, 11 comments
  6. Personal Encyclopedias 381 upvotes, 77 comments
  7. Two studies in compiler optimisations 89 upvotes, 14 comments
  8. From zero to a RAG system: successes and failures 78 upvotes, 12 comments
  9. The EU still wants to scan your private messages and photos 1287 upvotes, 344 comments
  10. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 689 upvotes, 222 comments
  11. My DIY FPGA board can run Quake II 178 upvotes, 52 comments
  12. Landmark L.A. jury verdict finds Instagram, YouTube were designed to addict kids 27 upvotes, 4 comments
  13. Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 923 upvotes, 410 comments
  14. Shell Tricks That Make Life Easier (and Save Your Sanity) 196 upvotes, 82 comments
  15. Government agencies buy commercial data about Americans in bulk 104 upvotes, 41 comments
  16. Swift 6.3 141 upvotes, 66 comments
  17. Earthquake scientists reveal how overplowing weakens soil at experimental farm 174 upvotes, 91 comments
  18. ARC-AGI-3 427 upvotes, 270 comments
  19. LibreOffice and the Art of Overreacting 77 upvotes, 39 comments
  20. 90% of Claude-linked output going to GitHub repos w <2 stars 321 upvotes, 200 comments
  21. End of "Chat Control": EU Parliament Stops Mass Surveillance in Voting Thriller 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR 63 upvotes, 36 comments
  23. Maxell MXCP-P100 – wireless cassette player 41 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 366 upvotes, 284 comments
  25. The truth that haunts the Ramones: 'They sold more T-shirts than records' 166 upvotes, 123 comments
  26. Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript 53 upvotes, 34 comments
  27. Niche Museums 28 upvotes, 15 comments
  28. What came after the 486? 69 upvotes, 59 comments
  29. When it comes to data-ink ratio, optimize rather than maximize 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Ashby (YC W19) Is Hiring Engineers Who Make Product Decisions 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 26 March 2026. Source here.
